title: pelargonium × schulzianum
intro: Pelargonium × schulzianum, also known as Mountain Rose or Rose Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oil. The health benefits of Pelargonium × schulzianum include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Pelargonium × schulzianum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
